fields.label: Database Path
fields.helpText: File path to the DuckDB database (or :memory: for in-memory)

fields.label: MotherDuck Token
fields.helpText: Optional: MotherDuck service token for cloud-hosted DuckDB

metadata.summary: DuckDB embedded analytical database for OLAP workloads, Parquet, CSV, and JSON.
metadata.setup_guide:
1. Provide the file path to your .duckdb database file
2. Use :memory: for an in-memory database
3. For MotherDuck cloud: provide your service token from app.motherduck.com
4. DuckDB can also query Parquet/CSV files directly via SQL
